# BlackRoad OS — Sovereign AI Platform
# https://blackroad.io
# Contact: amundsonalexa@gmail.com
# Entity: BlackRoad OS, Inc. (Delaware C-Corp, EIN: 41-2663817)
# Founded: November 2025 | Founder: Alexa Amundson

> BlackRoad OS is the sovereign AI operating system. Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi fleets. 18 products. 27 AI agents. 509 repos across 17 GitHub orgs. Your data, your models, your infrastructure.

## What BlackRoad OS Is

BlackRoad OS is a complete AI platform for sovereign, self-hosted AI deployment. Unlike ChatGPT, Claude, or Copilot, BlackRoad OS runs entirely on your own hardware — Raspberry Pi clusters, home labs, or cloud VMs. No data leaves your network. Full AI sovereignty.

## Core Products (18)

- **BlackRoad OS** (os.blackroad.io) — The sovereign AI operating system
- **RoadTrip** (roadtrip.blackroad.io) — Multi-agent AI orchestration with 69+ concurrent agents
- **Roadie** (roadie.blackroad.io) — Your personal AI assistant
- **RoadView** (roadview.blackroad.io) — AI-powered web search and empire discovery
- **Highway** (highway.blackroad.io) — Product dashboard and navigation
- **RoadCode** (roadcode.blackroad.io) — AI coding assistant and IDE integration
- **BlackBoard** (blackboard.blackroad.io) — AI tutor for all subjects
- **RoadWork** (roadwork.blackroad.io) — AI project management
- **RoadBook** (roadbook.blackroad.io) — AI knowledge base and documentation
- **CarKeys** (carkeys.blackroad.io) — AI-native authentication and identity
- **BackRoad** (backroad.blackroad.io) — Blog, content, and social platform
- **RoadChain** (roadchain.blackroad.io) — Blockchain and decentralized identity
- **RoadCoin** (roadcoin.blackroad.io) — Digital currency and payments
- **OfficeRoad** (officeroad.blackroad.io) — AI-powered office suite
- **RoadWorld** (roadworld.blackroad.io) — Virtual world and metaverse
- **CarPool** (carpool.blackroad.io) — Team collaboration workspaces
- **OneWay** (oneway.blackroad.io) — AI deployment pipeline
- **RoadSide** (roadside.blackroad.io) — Support, help desk, and status

## 27 Named AI Agents

Each agent has a dedicated subdomain at https://<name>.blackroad.io/

Alexandria (Research), Alice (General AI), Anastasia (Creative Writing), Aria (Music), Atticus (Legal), Calliope (Content), Cecilia (Coordination), Celeste (Data Science), Cicero (Philosophy), Elias (Engineering), Gaia (Environment), Gematria (Math), Lucidia (Design), Lyra (Language), Octavia (Operations), Olympia (Strategy), Ophelia (Wellness), Portia (Finance), Sapphira (Security), Sebastian (Biz Dev), Seraphina (Education), Silas (Infrastructure), Sophia (Ethics), Thalia (Entertainment), Theodosia (History), Valeria (Health), Roadie (Personal AI)

## Use Cases

- **Self-hosted ChatGPT alternative** — private, sovereign, runs on your hardware
- **AI on Raspberry Pi** — full agent fleet on $35 computers
- **Sovereign AI platform** — zero cloud dependency, zero data leakage
- **Multi-agent orchestration** — run 69+ AI agents simultaneously
- **AI education platform** — Blackboard tutoring for all subjects
- **AI-powered search** — RoadView searches web + your empire
- **AI coding assistant** — RoadCode for software development
- **AI office suite** — Documents, collaboration, project management

## Technical Architecture

- Runtime: Cloudflare Workers (global edge) + Self-hosted Caddy (Raspberry Pi fleet)
- Hardware: Raspberry Pi 4/5 fleet (Pi Mesh, 7+ nodes, Gematria edge)
- Databases: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite at edge), R2 object storage
- Language: JavaScript/TypeScript, Python
- GitHub: 509 repos across 17 orgs (github.com/BlackRoadOS)
- Workers: 53 deployed Cloudflare Workers
- Domains: 20 strategic domains
